creator: pc@akk.uni-karlsruhe.de
text:

These are the last few lines that I got from the window I started cvsup
from (with X, but without I recall the same thing). No syslog, no way
to cvsup ...blah... > file 2>&1, just cut 'n paste.

When I start the update, the window gets literally flooded with these
messages.

This effect I noticed from when I started cvsup-dating from 2.2.5-RELEASE,
so I felt quite safe to ignore it, also since cvsup-dating seems to work
fine.

There's another machine that I have access to runnting 2.2.5-RELEASE, and
no reports of such faults whatsoever. But I don't dare updating it because
of some other problems I had on my 'petra'.

Fix: 

I have no idea.
How-To-Repeat: 
Well, calling cvsup <cvsup-file> starts the flood here...
